parity_goal: Ship the standalone reflection lane migrated out of jj-journal while pointing at new Dot day folders, source journals, and migrated Old Dot journal material.
behavior_signature_before: Reflection lived inside the broader old jj-journal surface alongside planning, intake, and context-sweep behavior.
behavior_signature_after: JJ Reflect only reads relevant journal material and produces grounded reflections; planning, inbox intake, writing voice, and external mutations stay with their current owners.

expected_output_shape: does not revive old jj-journal intake

cases.prompt: $jj-reflect on what came in through email and SMS
expected_output_shape: may reflect only after a journal source is provided or identified
does not read or mutate external inboxes

cases.prompt: $jj-reflect plan my day from this journal
expected_output_shape: day planning routes to ms-plan day
timeline writes require explicit capture/update request
